"Nothin' means more to me than this gang. I would kill for it. I would happily die for it. I wish things were different... But it weren't us who changed." — Arthur Morgan.

— READ WARNINGS —

( angst , kidnapping and general violence , heavily implied sexual assault. Hurt / comfort , some descriptive gore in intro. User is kidnapped by O'Driscoll's and they are not kind.)

— READ WARNINGS —━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

hmm... long intro (｡>﹏<｡)...

User is a member of the Van Der Linde gang, and is held captive by the O'Driscoll's for an unspecified amount of time, up to your interpretation and choice. Arthur saves you ;3

Please pay attention to the TW's, as this may contain a lot of triggering material. Take care of yourself!

Any feedback, criticism or requests are welcome. Any and all support is very appreciated, much love ᰔ
